mapper.sql: account_id, account, nickname, password_hash, avatar_version, role, permit, status, deleted_at, created_at, created_ip, last_login_at, last_login_ip, e2ee_salt, identity_pub_key
mapper.update: UPDATE accounts SET nickname = #{nickname} WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE accounts SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE accounts SET e2ee_salt = #{e2eeSalt} WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE accounts SET role = #{role} WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE accounts SET avatar_version = avatar_version + 1 WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE accounts SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
